summary: Dependabot security update job failed with exit code 1 during the update_files phase. The updater encountered one or more unspecified errors, but the actual error details are not provided in the context.

evidence.quote: Dependabot encountered '1' error(s) during execution, please check the logs for more details.
evidence.reason: Generic error message indicating failures occurred but does not specify the nature of the error

evidence.quote: Error: Command failed with exit code 1: /bin/sh -c $DEPENDABOT_HOME/dependabot-updater/bin/run update_files
evidence.reason: Confirms the updater command failed but provides no actionable error details

evidence.quote: Root cause analysis requires access to full Dependabot updater logs, not present in provided chunk
evidence.reason: Explicit statement that the context is insufficient to determine the root cause

suggested_fix: Consult the full Dependabot updater logs from the container to identify the specific error that occurred during the update_files phase

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
